titleStmt.title: SII 23.98: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 98. (A.R. No. 98 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the same wall Mār. Kulaśēkhara I: year 33

summary.p: This is dated in the 33rd year of the Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Kulaśēkharadēva ‘who was pleased to take all countries’ (A.D. 1268 to 1308). The details of the date are given as Mithuna 12, Amāvāsyā Mrigaśīrsha but these are found to be irregular. The date meant was probably A.D. 1301, June 7. It records an undertaking given by the Kanmāḷa residents of Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇipuram, that they would measure out annually 10 kalam and odd of paddy to the temple of Nālāyira-Īśvaramuḍaiyār, for the expenses of conducting a festival in the month of Śittirai in honour of Tiruvīdi-Nāchchiyār Umaiyāṇḍār (whose image was) consecrated in the temple by one Śokkaṉ Vittagaṉ. In case no festival was conducted in any year, the paddy was to be utilised for the daily offerings and worship of the goddess throughout that month.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkara
vattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamum koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkula
cekaratevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 3vatu mituṉanāyaṟṟu 10 2
ntiyatiyum Amāvāsyayum peṟṟa mṛgaśirṣattunāḷ
muḷḷiṉāṭṭu brahmadeśam śrīrājarājacaturvedimaṅka
lattut teṉpiṭākai kallaṭaikkuṟicciyil Uṭaiyā
r nālāyira Īśvaramuṭaiyanāyiṉāṟkku cokkaṉ vittakaṉ Uka
ntaruḷappaṇṇuvitta tiruvitinācciyār Umaiyāṉṭā
ṟkkuk kallaṭaikkuṟicciyāṉa kṣatriya[ śikhāmaṇi] purattuk kaṇmmā
ḷarom Iṉṉācciyāṟkkuc cittirait tiruṉāḷukkut tirunāḷpaṭikku
nāṅkaḷ Āṇṭoṉṟukku kuṭuppatāṉa ḷa 9 1000sa Innellup pa
tiṉkalaṉe tūṇippatakkum Aṟunāḻikkālāl koyi
llile Iṭṭaḷantu kuṭuppomākavum Ippaṭi kuṭātu vi
ṭil taṭuttum vaḷaittu maṇkalan takattu veṇkala
mpaṟittu mippaṭikku koḷvārākavum Ippaṭikkuc can
tirātittavaṟc celvatākavum Orokālaṅk(ā)ḷile tirunāḷ
muṭṭumākil Innācciyāṟkku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭiyāka cittirai
ḷa patiṉ kalaṉe tūṇippatakkum koyilile Iṭṭaḷantu kuṭup(pā)
pomākavum Ippaṭi ceyyumiṭattu kollaṟkku taccaṟkku taṭṭāṟkku
tiru muṉṉoṭukkāka muvaṟkku Aṟunāḻiyāka tirumuṉṉoṭukkup peṟuva tākavu
m Ippaṭi cammatittuc cantirātittavaṟ celvatākak kalveṭṭikkuṭut
tom kṣatriyaśikhāmaṇipurattu kaṇmāḷarom nālāirakkollaṉ
taṟkuṟikkum cempiyataraiya taccaṉ taṟkuṟikkum taṟkuṟimāṭṭeṟinte
ṉ Ivai kāliṅka rāyar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nakarataṭṭāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 23.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
